title: test coverage for pkg/specgenutilexternal FindMountType
body:
`FindMountType` in `pkg/specgenutilexternal` parses the `--mount` string — it
pulls out `type=<bind|tmpfs|volume|...>` and returns the remaining tokens, or
defaults the type to `volume` when none is given. It has no unit tests despite
a few non-obvious behaviors: the `type=` token can appear anywhere (not just
first), only the first `type=` is used, and malformed input (empty, or multiple
CSV records) is an error.
